morning_brief.preview:
# EverPass Morning Brief — Tuesday, May 5, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive
1. **Charter / Taylor — NBA scope verified.** Ryan drafted reply at 01:43Z; awaiting his send. NBC commercial grant verified does NOT include NBA per 2026-05-05 three-source confirmation.
2. **Charter amended agreement — deadline June 15, 2026.** Section I.1 BTS extension. Multiple workstreams gate on signing.
3. **Charter Program Status DELAYED.** NFL ST Sales 7/9, Spectrum TV Control Pro 7/13. Three leadership decisions pending.
4. **DIRECTV — legal route + PR only.** Not actively responding commercially per Ryan's directive.
5. **Victory+ NWSL amendment EXECUTED 2026-05-02 via DocuSign.** Closed.

## Today's Schedule (May 5)
- 12:00 PM — NHL/EVERPASS Tech Call (Joseph Loreski)
- 12:00 PM — NHL/EVERPASS Tech touch base
- 1:00-2:30 PM — Management Sync (Alex Kaplan, CT Conference Room)
- 2:30 PM — Weekly Touch Base
- 3:00 PM — FW: EverPass 2026/2027 Launch (Charter, Ligocki organizing)

## Tomorrow's Schedule (May 6)
- 10:30 AM — DAZN catch up (Dan Gardiner)
- 11:00 AM — Apple/EverPass Integration Bi-Weekly (Daniel Hegeman)
- 11:30 AM — Marketing/Content catchup
- 12:30 PM — Weekly Catchup

## Active Partner Pulse
- Charter dominant inbound (Taylor 5/5 NBA scope question pending Ryan's send + extension confirmation)
- NESN owes-response (Plaehn 5/5)
- Monumental DocuSign in flight
- Victory+ closed this week
- Disney/ESPN, NBCU, YES all active

## Pricing
2026-05-04 v2 pricing sheet applied to Price Book FY27 Outputs. NFLST Early Bird (12 cells) + 8-Pay formulas (/9 → /8) updated. Partner-insights flagged across Charter, DIRECTV, Comcast, NBCU, Disney, YTTV.

critical.title: Charter / Taylor — NBA scope verified, draft response pending Ryan's send
critical.body: NBC commercial grant verified does NOT include NBA per 2026-05-05 three-source confirmation (Aug 7 2023 Term Sheet Section 4 + Exhibits A/B; NBCU's own Jul 14 2025 amendment proposal explicitly added NBA to a new Schedule 1; Apr 11 2026 internal status confirms NBA Tuesday games lack a commercial venue home). Ryan drafted reply 2026-05-05 01:43Z; awaiting his send to Taylor Holden.

critical.title: Charter amended agreement — deadline June 15, 2026
critical.body: Negotiation period extended Apr 29 from May 15 to June 15 (Section I.1 BTS dated Jul 5 2025). Ryan owns. Multiple workstreams gate on signing: NFL ST sales delayed 6/1 to 7/9, Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 6/15 to 7/13. ATX API GO/NO-GO same day as deal deadline.

critical.title: Charter Program Status DELAYED — leadership decisions pending
critical.body: Three decisions pending: cross-functional NFL ST owner (ASAP), CSV bridge approve (mid-May), conjoined STVA + EP Fire Stick sales (before June). Owner: Ryan Blood for amended agreement.

critical.title: DIRECTV — legal route + PR only (no commercial response)
critical.body: Per Ryan's 2026-05-05 directive: not actively responding commercially. Pricing rack rates do NOT need to be quoted. Active workstreams: legal route + PR only. SymphonyAI demand letter and audit posture handled by Kelley Drye.

critical.title: Victory+ NWSL amendment EXECUTED 2026-05-02 via DocuSign
critical.body: Mary Karol DocuSign completion 2026-05-02. NWSL amendment fully executed. CLOSED. Move to monitoring; no longer critical.

deals.next_action: Awaiting Ryan's NBA-scope-verified reply to Taylor Holden. Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13. Fire Stick joint sales alignment needed before 5/21 STVA launch.
NWSL amendment fully executed via DocuSign 2026-05-02. Move to monitoring.
Not actively responding commercially. Legal + PR posture only per 2026-05-05 directive. Pricing rack rates NOT to be quoted.
Plaehn 5/5 inbound chasing response on term sheet v7. Term sheet has been in NESN court since Apr 19.
Altman 5/5 outbound on schedule. McIntosh Track A/B direction still overdue. EVO pricing gap and DAI impression share blank still open.
Upfront reminder 5/5 inbound. NBA confirmed NOT in commercial grant per 2026-05-05 verification. Side letter or amendment required for any NBA commercial offering.
DocuSign sent 4/29 by Bernheimer; follow-up 5/1. Tech integration in progress; Jul 2026 launch target.
Feneque 4/29 inbound on Exhibit B device multiplier discussion (3 fix options).
Fury event report status; $500K Mayweather/Pacquiao cancellation fee — counter as MG credit.
Executable draft was 1 day overdue. Two-track deal (Weather API + 24/7 FAST channel) targeting late-May launch. Open: AW concurrence on narrowed Exhibit B Section 3 suspension.
#REF! errors in Pricing tab rows 101-102, 120 must be repaired before final pricing. AWS vs Uplynk ingest decision blocking.
Critical path to August 2026 NFL kickoff. Pending YTTV: SKU pricing + date, device/DRM matrix, EPG feed.
Steady-state loss vs forecast. Go/No-Go pending; price elasticity plateau above $75/mo.
April 3 Sinclair redlines vs execution copy under review. Decide 2026 vs 2027 timing; package with CHSN.
Hoffberg rate card overdue 15+ days. Reassess WBD posture in light of WBD-Paramount shareholder vote outcome.
Bi-weekly integration cadence with Hegeman. Monitor.
Catch up tomorrow with Dan Gardiner. Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+.
